title: chowbah #2327
definition:
Hobah = "hiding place"

 1) a city north of Damascus to which Abraham pursued the kings who
    had pillaged Sodom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hobah = "hiding place"

 1) a city north of Damascus to which Abraham pursued the kings who
    had pillaged Sodom

    NASB:  a place N. of Damascus
